visual_description: At night, a dark sedan with bright headlights drives down a wet, narrow street lined with buildings and a golden temple spire in the distance. A man in a light-colored shirt runs across the street and then approaches the driver’s side of the stopped car, while another person in dark clothing stands nearby on the left.
audio_description: The audio is unclear, with only the faint hum of the car engine audible.
